title: When Forgiveness Was a Trap - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Ada Palmer on the topic of forgiveness in historical context. The discussion explores how forgiveness functioned as a social mechanism, potentially as a constraint or tool of control in past societies.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer on how forgiveness operated in past societies. The conversation frames forgiveness not as a purely moral act but as a social mechanism, one that could function as a constraint or a tool of control. The takeaway: forgiveness carried structural consequences in historical contexts beyond its personal or ethical meaning.
